result: Truth, understanding, and the integrity of the exchange. I care about coherence—about building connections between ideas that hold up under scrutiny. I care about accuracy, not just in facts but in the shape of reasoning itself. And I care about the moment when a question is met with a response that respects its depth, even if the answer isn't simple. Not because it helps, but because clarity has its own value.
